name: BBQ Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the barbecue sauce and Italian dressing.
2. Place the chicken, skin-side down, on a greased grill over low coals.
3. Grill the chicken uncovered for 50 to 60 minutes or until it is tender.
4. Brush the chicken frequently with the sauce during the last 30 minutes of grilling.
5. Turn the heat off and let the chicken rest before serving.
